positive: A symmetrical, stylized, and highly intricate composition of bioluminescent celestial flora and mythical winged creatures. The scene features swirling, elegant cosmic nebula patterns interwoven with detailed Art Nouveau vines, stylized moths, and glowing, ethereal fauna. The color palette must utilize deep midnight blues, sapphire, emerald green, and glowing gold accents. Focus on clean silhouettes, strong contrast, and central composition, perfect for a repeating textile print. Lighting should be volumetric and dramatic, emphasizing the glowing elements against deep shadows. Clean lines, hyperdetailed, maximalist style, suitable for screen printing.
